source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/11_Audit F-up/240415-17 ISO 갱신심사 & 2,3G MDR 심사 - 3EC/MDR 심사_경부적합 보완/기술문서 전체_24.04.23_pdf/A-TCF-5-156 Test Reports (rev.3).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Technical Documentation A-TCF-5-156 Rev. 3 summarizes test reports and compliance results for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW, and WBW880A.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by listing applied standards, laboratories, report numbers, issue dates, and compliance results for safety, EMC, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, imaging performance, transportation, enclosure protection, and RED testing.
keyPoints: All listed summarized test results are marked Compliance except EN 62220-1-1:2015 imaging performance, which states Test result (Refer to summary).
Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. performed IEC 60601-1, EMC, wireless EMC, and RED-related testing listed in the document.
Korea Testing Laboratory performed biocompatibility testing to ISO 10993-1:2018, ISO 10993-5:2009, and ISO 10993-10:2010.
SGS Korea Co., Ltd. performed transportation environment and enclosure protection testing listed in the document.
The document includes laboratory certificate references for Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Certificate and Korea Testing Laboratory GLP Compliance statement.

evidence.claim: Document A-TCF-5-156 is Rev. No. 3 and has Rev. Date April 12, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Technical Documentation Document No. A-TCF-5-156 Rev. No. 3 9. Test Reports Rev. Date April 12, 2024

evidence.claim: Products are inspected under the quality management system before being placed on the market and tested according to the applied standard.
evidence.evidenceText: All our products are subjected to be inspected in accordance with our quality management system before the products are placed on the market. Also, the devices are tested in accordance with the applied standard.
evidence.pageTarget: Quality management system inspection and applied standards

evidence.claim: IEC 60601-1 basic safety and essential performance testing for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW was performed by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. with report REP001842 issued 2022-11-08 and result Compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard IEC 60601-1: 2005 /A1:2012 (3.1rd, CB Scheme) Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-11-08 Test Report No. REP001842 Test result Compliance

evidence.claim: Medical electrical equipment EMC testing under EN 60601-1-2 was performed by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. for A1417MCW, F1417MCW, and A1717MCW with compliance results.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.2 Medical Electrical Equipment – Part1-2: Electromagnetic disturbances – requirements and tests Applied Standard EN 60601-1-2:2014 /A1:2021 Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW A1717MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-10-04 2022-10-04 Test Report No. NK-22-E-0810 NK-22-E-0813 Test result Compliance
evidence.pageTarget: EN 60601-1-2 EMC test reports NK-22-E-0810 and NK-22-E-0813

evidence.claim: Wireless EMC testing used EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6, with Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. as laboratory and compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.3 (Wireless) EMC Test Applied Standard EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2 EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6 Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW A1717MCW Issued date of the test report 2024-03-07 2024-03-07 Test result Compliance

evidence.claim: Biocompatibility testing for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW used ISO 10993-1:2018, ISO 10993-5:2009, and ISO 10993-10:2010, with Korea Testing Laboratory as laboratory and compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.4 Biocompatibility Applied Standard ISO 10993-1:2018 ISO 10993-5: 2009 ISO 10993-10:2010 Laboratory Korea Testing Laboratory Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Issued date of the test report 2020-04-17 Test Report No. 20-007374-01-1 Test result Compliance

evidence.claim: Digital X-ray imaging device characteristics testing used EN 62220-1-1:2015 and in-house testing by H&abyz Co., Ltd. for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard EN 62220-1-1:2015 Laboratory In-house testing (H&abyz Co., Ltd.) Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-11-21 Test Report No. A-TCF-5-116 Test result (Refer to summary)

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; authoritySignal metadata indicates MFDS/domestic but this is not directly evidenced in the document body.
EMC standard evidence appears inconsistent: the table lists EN 60601-1-2:2015 /A1:2021, while the summary lists EN 60601-1-2:2014 /A1:2021.
Wireless EMC report amendment references appear inconsistent: the table lists REP031070 as amendment of NK-22-E-0812, but the summary text shows amendment of NK-22-E-0815.
The IPX6 summary lists manufacturer-set conditions as the applied standard, while the earlier test results table lists IEC 60529:1989+A1:1999+A2:2013.
The digital X-ray imaging test result is not stated as Compliance; it says Test result (Refer to summary).
